artifacts.summary: 14-slide CONFERENCE talk mapping the /epi workflow and synthetic KAT-vs-TAU RCT for a mixed clinical/informatics audience

key_messages: The /epi workflow compresses CONSORT-compliant RCT scaffolding into four commands with pre-specification enforced by Stage 0 forcing questions
Headline recovered OR 3.29 (95% CI 1.57-6.89) is robust to per-protocol and single-imputation sensitivity but collapses to 1.29 under a worst-case tipping-point, with honesty baked into the pipeline
Byte-identical reproducibility on a hostile bare-base R environment (0/13 optional packages) proves reproducibility is a property of the generated code, not a promise from the extension
next_steps: Run /slides 29 --design to resolve open questions (venue, time budget, speaker identity, Slidev format) and produce the implementation plan
